summary: Implemented P1-09 behavior recall audit ledger and feedback writeback gate. finish_task now writes behavior recall entries, record_feedback_correction writes correction recall plus conflict quarantine/review artifacts, status/verify commands were added, health/freshness/verify:goal/Observatory were wired, and app commit 9ed067b was pushed.
decisions: P1-09 is now represented by behavior_recall_audit.jsonl and behavior_recall_status.json.
Completion/handoff/error/direction-change recall is derived from finish_task outcomes and cues.
Direct feedback corrections quarantine conflicting older behavior memory and queue behavior-conflict review instead of leaving equal-weight memory retrievable.
Current goal remains incomplete because live pre-response, task lifecycle, and completion-grade semantic RAG blockers remain.
next_steps: Run status:behavior-recall and status:refresh after this finish trace to record current behavior recall evidence.
Run verify:goal to confirm P1-09 requirement status and remaining blockers.
Continue with task lifecycle settlement or P1-10 semantic retrieval and generated-answer evaluation.
search_queries: behavior recall audit ledger feedback correction conflict quarantine
